violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the 3 bay sink room. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap available in establishment at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The hand-washing sink in the 3 bay sink room had equipment/items stored in it. A hand-washing sink shall be always accessible for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The hand-washing sinks in the ice cream area and 3 bay sink room were lacking paper towels. Paper towels provided at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Food items in the open-air cooler were observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were moved further back into cold zone at time of inspection. Per the PIC, the unit is to be adjusted to colder ambient temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

At the time of inspection, cases of beverages were observed stored on the floor in the storage areas and the retail area. Cases of beverages are to be stored off the floor. Items were adjusted to be stored off the floor at the time of insepction. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
